_note: Structured backlog for roadmap_driver. Seeded from doc/renquant-system-feature-map.md §2. The driver auto-picks the first pending, unblocked, non-consequential item. Consequential items (GPU/deploy/strategy/live) are operator-only. Update statuses as items ship.

items.title: Route orchestrator artifact lookups through ArtifactResolver
items.prompt: ArtifactResolver (src/renquant_orchestrator/artifact_resolver.py, merged #131) is the single fail-closed resolution authority but is not yet wired. Route the ad-hoc Path(ref).resolve()/.exists() artifact lookups in build_wf_manifest.py, build_patchtst_wf_manifest.py and retrain_*.py through resolve_artifact() so they fail closed and can carry sha256 provenance. Do NOT change the manifest-row JSON schema (cross-repo contract); only the resolution path. Add tests.

items.title: Extract the next cohesive unit out of the sim/runner god-file
items.prompt: Continue the strangler-fig decomposition of the 2958-LOC runner / 3476-LOC scorer (after sim_nav/sim_price/sim_cash, #376/#375/#366). Extract one more cohesive unit (pure function or module) with invariant tests, gated by replay-parity (behaviour must be byte-identical). Keep it small and reviewable.

items.title: Adopt LiveStateV2 in the runner behind a flag
items.prompt: LiveStateV2 (src/renquant_orchestrator/live_state_v2.py, merged #132) round-trips live_state.alpaca.json losslessly. Wire the runner's live-state read/write through it behind a flag (default off), so adding a per-holding field becomes a 1-line change. The lossless to_v1_dict() inverse must be used on write so the on-disk v1 file is byte-identical when the flag is off. Add tests; do not change live behaviour when the flag is off.

items.title: Persist live gate verdicts to the decision ledger
items.prompt: GateRegistry + decision_ledger (merged #133 in the orchestrator) make 'why was this run sell-only?' one SQL query. Submit the live pre-flight / WF / buy-block gate verdicts to a per-run GateRegistry and persist them to the decision ledger at the aggregation step, so live runs become queryable. Mirror the verdict algebra into the umbrella kernel if a cross-import is not allowed. Add tests.

items.title: Intraday cadence + governors + validation (#26)
items.prompt: Implement the intraday risk-reaction cadence with governors and validation per the protection epic (task #26). Build the cadence + governor logic with tests; keep live-affecting behaviour behind a flag (default off) until the operator enables it.

items.title: Pre-registered PatchTST scale sweep
items.prompt: OPERATOR-ONLY (burns GPU). The prod model is 0.07M params / fast trains, so a pre-registered scale sweep (d_model / n_layers / seq_len grid) is nearly free. Run WF-gate-judged. Needs operator go for the GPU budget.

items.title: Regenerate the PatchTST WF corpus for the Sharpe stamp
items.prompt: OPERATOR-ONLY (GPU + writes live tree). Once a model passes the sanity gate, regenerate the PatchTST walkforward_v2 panel-ltr snapshots so the WF gate can produce a real Sharpe and stamp wf_gate_metadata (pre-flight then unblocks buys). Mirror of the GBDT R4 regen.

items.title: Decide the model label horizon (20d vs 60d)
items.prompt: OPERATOR DECISION. Evidence: 60d models all fail the placebo (slow 60d-label persistence IS the placebo); the 20d model passes it at the 2x-horizon shift. Switching to 20d re-architects the live horizon contract (QP mu horizon, calibrators). Decide: switch horizon, ensemble across horizons, or keep 60d. Collecting multi-seed 20d evidence in the meantime.
